title: • Share each tab to Notes or another app.</
content:
• Share each tab to Notes or another app.
• Use Tab Groups (iOS 16+) and sync via iCloud to Mac, then export from there.

Pro Tip: On a Mac, use the “Show All Tabs” screen, right-click and save URLs manually.

⸻

[AA02] CHROME (iOS 18.5)

A. Export Bookmarks

Method 1: Sync to Google Account
1. Make sure Chrome is synced:
Chrome > Settings > Sync > Bookmarks = ON
2. On desktop Chrome:
chrome://bookmarks → click ⋮ > Export Bookmarks
Saves .html file.

B. Export Open Tabs

Method 1: Sync Tabs to Desktop
1. Enable sync in Chrome iOS:
